# Orbit PowerWash

> Owner-operated pressure washing and soft washing serving Plainsboro, West Windsor, and Ewing, New Jersey. A local neighbor who shows up, answers the phone, and does careful work — not a franchise or a call center.

- **Business name:** Orbit PowerWash
- **Phone (call or text):** (609) 297-7412
- **Email:** quote@orbitpowerwash.com
- **Website:** https://orbitpowerwash.com
- **Type:** Service-area business (no storefront address)
- **Service area:** Plainsboro, West Windsor, and Ewing, New Jersey
- **Free same-day quotes:** text a couple of photos to (609) 297-7412 for a preliminary price the same day.

## Services (with honest starting price ranges)

- **Driveway Washing** — concrete and paver driveways surface-cleaned to an even finish, no wand stripes. About $130–$325.
- **House Washing (soft wash)** — low-pressure soft wash that kills algae, mildew, and cobwebs on vinyl, aluminum, and painted trim without forcing water behind the siding. About $250–$775.
- **Patio & Deck Washing** — concrete, pavers, wood, and composite, with pressure matched to the surface. About $110–$425.
- **Fence Washing** — vinyl and wood fences soft-washed to lift green algae and grime. From $150.
- **Trash Bin Cleaning** — garbage and recycling bins washed out, sanitized, and deodorized. From $25 per bin.

Note: a $150 job minimum applies to standalone visits. Bundling two or more services saves roughly 10–15%.

## Towns served (each with a dedicated page)

- **Pressure Washing in Plainsboro, NJ** — https://orbitpowerwash.com/pressure-washing-plainsboro/ — 10+ year-old subdivisions, north-facing vinyl siding that grows algae, paver driveways in newer developments, and townhome/HOA communities around Princeton Meadows.
- **Pressure Washing in West Windsor, NJ** — https://orbitpowerwash.com/pressure-washing-west-windsor/ — larger 2-story colonials (roughly 2,000–2,800 sq ft), the Princeton Junction commuter area, and long driveways.
- **Pressure Washing in Ewing, NJ** — https://orbitpowerwash.com/pressure-washing-ewing/ — older housing stock, mature-tree shade that grows mildew, and original concrete driveways showing years of buildup, near TCNJ.

## Good to know

- Owner-operated; you deal with the person doing the work.
- Soft wash is siding-safe: low pressure plus a cleaning solution that treats the growth, so the house stays cleaner longer.
- Pricing depends on surface size, condition, access, and water availability; the exact price is confirmed before any work begins.
- Brand new business — founding-customer pricing on the first 10 jobs.

## Contact

Call or text (609) 297-7412, email quote@orbitpowerwash.com, or use the quote form at https://orbitpowerwash.com/#quote. Try the live price estimator at https://orbitpowerwash.com/#estimator.
